title: bubblewrap bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
[0.6.3-1]
- Rebase to 0.6.3 which is supported upstream
  This release also includes the fix for CVE-2024-42472
  Fixes: #RHEL-56797
